released"}, {"text": " 4", "bold": true}, {"text": " resolutions to existing features!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this release:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": "url": "", "children": [{"text": "", "bold": true}]}, {"text": "Create new Customer Types", "bold": true}], "data-id": "create-new-customer-types"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can now create your own Customer Types for targeting and reporting on your customers!"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": feature you can:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create unique Customer Types ", "bold": true}, {"text": "to fit your business, for example Trade customers, Affiliates and more"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Target your Customer Types", "bold": true}, {"text": " in the "}, {"text": "Customer Activity Report", "bold": true}, {"text": " e.g. selectively add Customer Types to Newsletters, award bonus loyalty points and more!"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Filter reports ", "bold": true}, {"text": "by your Customer Types e.g. the Sales Report"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "p", "children": [{"text": "Customer Types can be assigned to existing customers at POS, so your staff can update the information quickly and easily!"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/360002982535/pos_customertype.gif", "embedData": {"url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/360002982535/pos_customertype.gif", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "pos_customertype.gif"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The existing system Customer Types will remain (Employee, Retail, Partner etc) but you can add and delete your own unique Customer Types as required!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To access the new Customer Types configuration settings navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings > Customer Types", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Resolutions", "bold": true}], "data-id": "resolutions"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Below is a list of resolutions included in the latest Maintenance Release:"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Voucher Expiry"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "An issue has been resolved where in specific circumstances the \"Forever\" voucher expiry period was unable to be selected. "}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Newsletters"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The [[unsubscribe]] placeholder now correctly replaces the [[YourStoreName]] placeholder with Store Name in the Unsubscribe message."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Shopify"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express vouchers created through the Shopify Connector integration are now created with the correct voucher expiry date. "}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sales and Fulfilment Report"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "An issue affecting some clients when editing a sale from back office reports has been resolved.  "}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-27c3568a"}, {"type":
